text: Welcome aboard as an event helper! Please review the event playbook in #resources and check the upcoming events calendar.
Welcome to the community! You’re approved as a member. Please read the community guidelines in #start-here and introduce yourself in #introductions.
Welcome aboard as a mentor! Please review the mentor guidelines in #resources and opt into the mentor roster form.
Welcome aboard as a moderator! Please start by reviewing the community guidelines and the mod handbook in #resources.
